pokemon:nihilego.name: Nihilego
pokemon:nihilego.summary: One of the Ultra Beasts. It’s unclear whether or not this Pokémon is sentient, but sometimes it can be observed behaving like a young girl.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: One of the Ultra Beasts. It’s unclear whether or not this Pokémon is sentient, but sometimes it can be observed behaving like a young girl.
One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent.
It appeared in this world from an Ultra Wormhole. Nihilego appears to be a parasite that lives by feeding on people and Pokémon.
A life-form from another world, it was dubbed a UB and is thought to produce a strong neurotoxin.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: One of the Ultra Beasts. It’s unclear whether or not this Pokémon is sentient, but sometimes it can be observed behaving like a young girl.

form:nihilego.name: Nihilego
form:nihilego.summary: Nihilego form with Rock / Poison typing.
